title: Component Widget Binding Points
text: Component Widget Binding Points Component widget binding points are placeholders in the HTML where component widgets render their content: HTML Placeholders: Specific elements or attributes in the HTML structure that widgets target for rendering their content Automatic Generation: In Generated mode, binding points are automatically created by the layout template system Manual Placement: In Fragment and Full Document modes, you must include binding placeholders in your DSP layout content for widgets to render properly Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
